welcome_message: 👋 Hello, {name}! 🤖 I automatically add the current time to your Telegram profile name. For example: {name} [14:30] 📌 To get started, send /connect.
help_message: 📚 Commands List: 🔑 Main: /start — Start the bot /connect — Connect profile /disconnect — Disconnect profile /status — Bot status ⚙️ Settings: /settings — Settings menu /timezone — Time zone /format — Time format /interval — Update interval /prefix — Text prefix /notify — Notifications /language — Change language 📊 Statistics: /stats — Personal statistics /history — Update history /uptime — Bot uptime 🛡️ Other: /session — Session info /feedback — Suggestion/issue
connect_phone:
📱 Please send your phone number.

Press the button below or enter manually (e.g.: +998901234567).
connect_code: 📩 Telegram sent you a verification code. ⚠️ Important: To prevent Telegram from instantly expiring the code, send it with spaces or hyphens (e.g., 1 2 3 4 5 or 1-2-3-4-5). Please enter the code here:
connect_success: ✅ Successfully connected! The bot will now automatically update your name every {interval} minutes. 🕐 First update will happen soon.
disconnect_success:
✅ Profile successfully disconnected.
Your name has been restored to its original state.
already_connected:
ℹ️ You are already connected.
To disconnect, press /disconnect.
not_connected:
ℹ️ You are not connected yet.
To connect, press /connect.
status_active: 📊 Bot Status ✅ Status: Active 🕐 Next update: {next_update} 📈 Total updates: {total_updates} ⏱ Interval: {interval} minutes
settings_menu: ⚙️ Settings You can change the following settings:
prefix_prompt:
✏️ Enter a new prefix (max 20 characters).

For example: 🌙 or 💻

Send an empty message to remove.
stats_message: 📈 Personal Statistics 📊 Total updates: {total} 📅 Today: {today} ✅ Successful: {success} ❌ Errors: {failed} 📆 Registered: {registered}
feedback_prompt:
📝 Write your suggestion or issue.

Your message will be sent to the admin.
feedback_sent:
✅ Your message has been sent successfully!
Thank you! 🙏
admin_panel: 👑 Admin Panel 👥 Total users: {total} ✅ Active: {active} 🚫 Banned: {banned} 📊 Updates today: {today_updates}
error_general: ❌ An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
